properties.name: lost-column
properties.description: Lost Grid: creates a column. Syntax: <fraction> [<cycle>] [<gutter>] [flex|no-flex].

properties.name: lost-center
properties.description: Lost Grid: horizontally centers a container with a max-width.

properties.name: lost-align
properties.description: Lost Grid: aligns nested elements within a container.

properties.name: lost-offset
properties.description: Lost Grid: offsets a column by a fraction.

properties.name: lost-move
properties.description: Lost Grid: moves a column using relative positioning.

properties.name: lost-masonry-column
properties.description: Lost Grid: defines a masonry column.

properties.name: lost-flex-container
properties.description: Lost Grid: declares a flex-based grid container.
